project.name: OpenDocViewer
project.description: Fast, lightweight document viewer (PDF, TIFF, images) built with React + Vite, with a token-gated log server and runtime configuration.

packageScripts.start:logs: concurrently -n sys,user -c auto "npm run start:system-log" "npm run start:user-log"
packageScripts.dev:system-log: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=3001 LOG_TOKEN=devtoken node server/system-log-server.js
packageScripts.dev:logs: concurrently -n sys,user -c auto "npm run dev:system-log" "npm run dev:user-log"
packageScripts.dev:both: concurrently -n app,logs -c auto "npm run dev" "npm run dev:logs"
packageScripts.// release helpers: Run one of the release:* scripts, then push with --follow-tags.

recommendations: 4 files have no JSDoc doclets; AgentDocMap uses source-derived summaries for them.

symbols.name: calculateFitToScreenZoom
symbols.description: Calculate and set a zoom that fits the render surface within both viewport axes.

symbols.name: calculateFitToWidthZoom
symbols.description: Calculate and set a zoom that fits the render surface width within the pane viewport.

symbols.name: clamp
symbols.description: Clamp a numeric value into the inclusive range [min, max].

symbols.name: getRenderableSize
symbols.description: Read the intrinsic size of the active render surface.

symbols.name: getViewport
symbols.description: Resolve an exact viewport element from either a DOM node or a React-like ref.

symbols.name: getViewportSize
symbols.description: Read the exact client viewport available to the rendered pane.

symbols.name: handleZoomIn
symbols.description: Increase the zoom level by 10% (multiplicative), clamped to the safe range.

symbols.name: handleZoomOut
symbols.description: Decrease the zoom level by ~9.09% (inverse of +10%), clamped to the safe range.

symbols.name: MAX_ZOOM
symbols.description: Maximum allowed zoom factor (800%).

symbols.name: MIN_ZOOM
symbols.description: Minimum allowed zoom factor (5%).

symbols.name: ZOOM_CHANGE_THRESHOLD
symbols.description: Treat zoom deltas smaller than this as unchanged to avoid redundant React updates.

symbols.name: ZOOM_IN_MULTIPLIER
symbols.description: Zoom-in multiplier: each click increases zoom by 10% of the current zoom level (1.1x).

symbols.name: ZOOM_OUT_MULTIPLIER
symbols.description: Zoom-out multiplier: inverse of +10%, approximately a 9.09% decrease.

symbols.name: ZoomCalcOptions
symbols.description: Optional calculation overrides.

symbols.name: createFallbackMainThreadError
symbols.description: Creates an error that tells the caller this worker path is unsupported and should be retried on the main thread.

symbols.name: workerScope
symbols.description: OpenDocViewer - generated PDF worker.
